sentences.en: Don't forget to put on clean socks.
sentences.zh: 別忘了穿上乾淨的襪子。
sentences.ipa: /dont fɚˈɡet tu pʊt ɑn klin sɑks/

sentences.en: Let's clear the table together when we're done.
sentences.zh: 吃完後我們一起收拾餐桌。
sentences.ipa: /lets klɪr ðə ˈtebl təˈɡeðɚ wen wɪɚ dʌn/

sentences.en: Close your eyes and think of something happy.
sentences.zh: 閉上眼睛，想一些開心的事。
sentences.ipa: /kloz jʊɚ aɪz ənd θɪŋk ʌv ˈsʌmθɪŋ ˈhæpi/

sentences.en: What was your favorite part of the trip?
sentences.zh: 這趟旅行你最喜歡哪個部分？
sentences.ipa: /wʌt wɑz jʊɚ ˈfevɚɪt pɑrt ʌv ðə trɪp/

sentences.en: Let's drink some water before we keep playing.
sentences.zh: 我們先喝點水再繼續玩。
sentences.ipa: /lets drɪŋk sʌm ˈwɔtɚ bɪˈfɔr wi kip ˈpleɪŋ/

sentences.en: I'll pick you up right after school.
sentences.zh: 放學後我馬上去接你。
sentences.ipa: /aɪl pɪk ju ʌp raɪt ˈæftɚ skul/

sentences.en: You figured that out all by yourself!
sentences.zh: 你自己就想出來了！
sentences.ipa: /ju ˈfɪɡjɚd ðæt aʊt ɔl baɪ jʊɚˈself/

sentences.en: Let's build something together with your blocks.
sentences.zh: 我們用積木一起蓋東西吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets bɪld ˈsʌmθɪŋ təˈɡeðɚ wɪð jʊɚ blɑks/

sentences.en: Your feelings matter, and I'm listening.
sentences.zh: 你的感受很重要，我在聽。
sentences.ipa: /jʊɚ ˈfilɪŋz ˈmætɚ ənd aɪm ˈlɪsənɪŋ/

sentences.en: You made the right choice, thank you.
sentences.zh: 你做了正確的選擇，謝謝你。
sentences.ipa: /ju med ðə raɪt tʃɔɪs θæŋk ju/

sentences.en: You should feel really good about that.
sentences.zh: 你應該為這件事感到很驕傲。
sentences.ipa: /ju ʃʊd fil ˈrɪli ɡʊd əˈbaʊt ðæt/

sentences.en: If you get lost, stay right where you are.
sentences.zh: 如果走失了，就待在原地。
sentences.ipa: /ɪf ju ɡet lɔst ste raɪt wer ju ɑr/

sentences.en: Let's wash this cut and cover it up.
sentences.zh: 我們把傷口洗乾淨並包起來吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets wɑʃ ðɪs kʌt ənd ˈkʌvɚ ɪt ʌp/

sentences.en: We don't see your uncle often, let's enjoy today.
sentences.zh: 我們不常見到叔叔，今天要好好珍惜。
sentences.ipa: /wi dont si jʊɚ ˈʌŋkl ˈɔfən lets ɪnˈdʒɔɪ təˈde/

sentences.en: You made your friend laugh, that was sweet.
sentences.zh: 你把朋友逗笑了，真貼心。
sentences.ipa: /ju med jʊɚ frend læf ðæt wɑz swit/

sentences.en: Let's shake hands and introduce yourself.
sentences.zh: 我們握手並自我介紹一下吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets ʃek hændz ənd ˌɪntrəˈdus jʊɚˈself/

sentences.en: The storm should pass by tonight.
sentences.zh: 這場暴風雨今晚應該就會過去。
sentences.ipa: /ðə stɔrm ʃʊd pæs baɪ təˈnaɪt/

sentences.en: You chose a book over the tablet, nice job.
sentences.zh: 你選了書而不是平板，做得好。
sentences.ipa: /ju tʃoz ə bʊk ˈovɚ ðə ˈtæblət naɪs dʒɑb/

sentences.en: Thank everyone for coming to your party.
sentences.zh: 謝謝大家來參加你的派對。
sentences.ipa: /θæŋk ˈevriwʌn fɔr ˈkʌmɪŋ tu jʊɚ ˈpɑrti/

sentences.en: One more story, then it's really lights out.
sentences.zh: 再一個故事，然後就真的要關燈了。
sentences.ipa: /wʌn mɔr ˈstɔri ðen ɪts ˈrɪli laɪts aʊt/
